subject: civic
topic_title: WHY LEADERS FAIL TO PROTECT THE INTEREST OF THEIR FOLLOWERS
learning_objectives: Mention five reasons leaders fail to protect the interest of their followers
List five ways to reduce leaders-2019 poor attitude towards their followers

sections.heading: WHY LEADERS FAIL TO PROTECT THE INTEREST OF THEIR FOLLOWERS
sections.content:
Leaders fail to protect the interest of their followers for some of the following reasons:
1. Party Interest.
2. Godfatherism.
3. Selfishness.
4. High cost of Electioneering Campaign.
5. Poor Financial Attitude of the Electorates.
6. Manipulation of Election Result by Leaders.

sections.heading: HOW TO CONTROL LEADERS THAT FAIL TO PROTECT THE INTEREST OF THEIR FOLLOWERS
sections.content:
1. Voting based on personal conviction.
2. Recalling non-performing representatives.
3. Promotion of transparency and accountability.
4. Reducing the cost of nomination forms.
5. Making public offices less attractive (reducing salaries/allowances).
